code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    ()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut cur = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end

  let total = list.len(nums)
  mut out = ""
  mut j = total - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
end
